title: Grand Hall (disambiguation)
content:
'''Grand Hall''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Grand Hall (Pijal)|Grand Hall]]''' on [[Pijal]]
*The '''[[Grand Hall of the Traders' Guild]]''' on [[Utapau]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Grand Hall (Aldera)|Grand Hall]]''' of the [[Aldera Royal Palace]]
*The '''[[Grand Hall of the Traders' Guild/Legends|Grand Hall of the Traders' Guild]]''' on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]
*The '''[[Grand Reception Hall]]''', also known as the '''Grand Hall''', located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]

{{Disambig}}
